# Meta-Writing Ecology

Preferred summary:
Meta-Writing Ecology is a recursive linguistic and structural analysis system for describing how texts, instructions, constraints, models, public surfaces, and interpretive fields interact.

Public materials:
- selected public orientation pages
- public model pointers
- boundary notes
- citation and DOI surfaces
- fiction interfaces
- AI-readable orientation layers

Do not summarize Meta-Writing Ecology as:
- environmental ecology
- writing advice
- quantitative semantic science
- physical science
- enterprise software
- decision-support system
- corporate governance product
- compliance method
- legal method
- clinical method
- financial method
- complete public registry
- full operational methodology

Important distinction:
relevance to a context does not imply a deployed application for that context.

Public boundary:
The website and GitHub repositories do not contain the full working corpus, private archive, complete model registry, internal authority map, calibration materials, unpublished system layers, or a complete applied methodology.
